problem id: 87007054
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10111101 -> 10001111
  10110001 -> 11001111
  00001100 -> 10111111
  01001101 -> 10001111
  11011010 -> 00011111
  11101011 -> 00101111
  00010111 -> 01101111
  11110111 -> 01101111
  11000011 -> 10101111

query: 01001100
predicted answer: 10111111
